name: chrX_Xp11_4_BCOR_SD
description: Xp11.4 SD cluster around BCOR/BCORL1 (BCORL1 is autosomal-shifted paralog on Xq26). Short ~10 kb SD pairs flank BCOR; BCOR-internal SDs and BCOR/BCORL1 paralogy cause cross-mapping problems for short reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Intronic BCOR SDs; BCORL1 paralog on Xq26 at ~85% protein identity but with stretches of high nucleotide identity in conserved domains.
